boundary: Flower size changes are real but do not uniquely identify staged pollinator loss.
The island series is clinal overall; the first pair may be flat within interval/tolerance, so this is not declared a discrete first threshold.
Bagged capsule set measures autonomous reproductive capacity, not realised selfing.
Oshima and four no-Bombus islands have 300-DPI flattened-corolla guide measurements; no mainland scan reference exists.
The second-transition direction now has focal scan calibration, but public-photo observation operators still require independent biological validation.
Ajania supplies one flat lineage for false-positive calibration, not a universal generalist estimate.
